Welcome to your personalized Swasthya Darshika report
This detailed insight; derived trom the ancient wisdom of Nadi Pariksha and
modern wellness analytics, maps your body's rhythm, highlights imbalances
guide to nurture harmony, and empowers you with knowledge: Use it as a
vitality; and mindful living, tailored uniquely to you:
Prakruti: Pitta Vata
blend of fire (dominant) and air elements
Your constitution is Pitta Vata, which brings together qudlities of both doshas As a
male with a normal body type; your tendencies reflect this combination-physically
mentally: You are likely to experience traits from both doshas depending on your and
litestyle, season; and stress levels Unclerstanding your prakruti helps you choose
foods; routines, and habits that support balance; health; and resilience
Vikruti: Pitta
blend of fire (dominant) and water elements
Your current Pitta imbalance; superimposed on a Vata Pitta Prakruti, suggests a need
to cool the body and mind: This imbalance can manifest as inflammation; acidity, and
heightened emotional responses like irritability, impacting your energy and digestion
Pulse Rate Rhythm Remark
Irregular Good 81

What is your toxin level? What does it mean?
Low toxin levels indicate efficient metabolic processes and minimal waste accumulation; supporting overall
health
What is your immunity level? What does it mean?
Medium immunity suggests & moderate ability to tight off infections, highlighting the need for supportive
lifestyle choices
What is your digestion level? What does it mean? 5.
High digestion signities a strong metabolic fire (Agni), enabling effective nutrient absorption and minimal
digestive discomfort;
What is your hyperthinking level? What does it mean? 6.
Medium hyperthinking indicates an active mind that can be prone to overthinking; focus techniques are
beneficial
What is your stress level? What does it mean? 7.
Medium stress levels require proactive management through relaxation techniques to prevent negative
impacts on health:

bodily optimal Medium hydration suggests a need to consciously increase fluid intake to maintain functions
What is your flexibility level? What does it mean? 9.
